---
title: "Track III: Transform and model"
format: html
---

# Instructions

For this final milestone, apply what you have learned about data transformation and modeling to further explore the solar illuminance data set. Consider the following steps:

1. Read in your data
2. Wrangle your data so it is in a format that is ready for modeling
3. Create a simple regression model and inspect your model results using functions from the broom package

To learn more about the variables contained in the data set(s), refer to the data dictionaries: https://rstudio.github.io/academy-tidyverse-solar-power/assets/illuminance_dictionary.html and https://rstudio.github.io/academy-tidyverse-solar-power/assets/precip_dictionary.html

# Milestone

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# loading packages
library(tidyverse)
```

## Transform and model
